[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001010110 4
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 011011000 4

01 10 011011110 6
12 21 110001100 4
23 32 110111111 8

45 54 111011101 7
56 65 111111111 a
67 76 111111110 8
70 07 111011110 7

35 53 111111111 a
